citations.claim: Each NeuronCore-v3 contains 28 MB of on-chip SRAM
citations.note: Architecture page states '28MB of on-chip SRAM' under NeuronCore-v3 memory section

citations.claim: NeuronCore-v3 Tensor Engine delivers 158 cFP8 TFLOPS per core
citations.note: NeuronCore-v3 architecture page: 'Tensor Engine: 158 cFP8 TFLOPS'

citations.claim: NeuronCore-v3 Tensor Engine delivers 79 BF16 TFLOPS per core
citations.note: NeuronCore-v3 architecture page: 'Tensor Engine: 79 BF16/FP16/TF32 TFLOPS'

citations.claim: Trainium1 chip had 2 NeuronCore-v2 cores at 190 BF16 TFLOPS total per chip
citations.note: Trainium (Trn1) architecture page: '2x NeuronCore-v2 cores' and '190 FP16/BF16/cFP8/TF32 TFLOPS' per device

citations.claim: Trainium2 chip has 8 NeuronCore-v3 cores
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page: 'Eight NeuronCore-v3' per chip

citations.claim: Trainium2 chip has 96 GiB HBM
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page: '96 GiB of device memory'

citations.claim: Trainium2 chip HBM bandwidth is 2.9 TB/s
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page: '2.9 TB/sec' HBM bandwidth per chip

citations.claim: Trainium2 chip dense FP8 compute is 1,299 TFLOPS
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page: '1,299 FP8 TFLOPS'

citations.claim: Trainium2 chip dense BF16 compute is 667 TFLOPS
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page: '667 BF16/FP16/TF32 TFLOPS'

citations.claim: Trainium1 chip has 32 GB HBM
citations.note: Trainium architecture page: '32GB of device memory'

citations.claim: Trainium1 chip HBM bandwidth is 820 GB/s
citations.note: Trainium architecture page: '820 GB/sec' HBM bandwidth

citations.claim: NeuronLink-v3 intra-instance bandwidth is 1,024 GB/s per chip
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: 'Intra-instance NeuronLink-v3: 1,024 GB/sec/chip'

citations.claim: NeuronLink-v3 inter-instance (UltraServer) bandwidth is 256 GB/s per chip
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: 'Inter-instance NeuronLink-v3: 256 GB/sec/chip'

citations.claim: NeuronLink-v2 (Trainium1) bandwidth was 384 GB/s per chip
citations.note: Trainium2 architecture page lists NeuronLink-v2 as '384 GB/sec per chip' in the gen-over-gen comparison table

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge has 16 Trainium2 chips
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '16 Trainium2 chips' for trn2.48xlarge

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge total HBM is 1,536 GiB
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '1,536 GiB device memory'

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge HBM bandwidth is 46.4 TB/s
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '46.4 TB/sec' HBM bandwidth

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge delivers 20.8 FP8 PFLOPS
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '20.8 PFLOPS' FP8 dense

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge delivers 10.7 BF16 PFLOPS
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '10.7 PFLOPS' BF16 dense

citations.claim: Trn2.48xlarge has 3,200 Gbps of EFAv3 networking
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '3,200 Gbps EFAv3'

citations.claim: Trn1.32xlarge had 512 GB HBM total
citations.note: Trn1 architecture page: '512 GB of shared accelerator memory (HBM)'

citations.claim: Trn1.32xlarge had 9.8 TB/s HBM bandwidth total
citations.note: Trn1 architecture page: '9.8 TB/s of total memory bandwidth'

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer has 64 Trainium2 chips
citations.note: Trn2 architecture page: 'A Trn2 UltraServer comprises four trn2u.48xlarge instances' with 16 chips each = 64 total

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer delivers 83.2 FP8 PFLOPS
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '83.2 PFLOPS' FP8 dense for UltraServer

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer delivers 42.8 BF16 PFLOPS
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '42.8 PFLOPS' BF16 dense for UltraServer

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer has 6,144 GiB of total HBM
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '6,144 GiB device memory' for UltraServer

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer has 185.6 TB/s of aggregate HBM bandwidth
citations.note: Trn2 architecture spec table: '185.6 TB/sec' HBM bandwidth for UltraServer

citations.claim: Roofline arithmetic intensity knee for Trn2 UltraServer ≈ 448 FLOPS/byte
citations.note: Derived: 83,200 TFLOPS / 185.6 TB/s = ~448 FLOPS/byte. Both inputs from Trn2 architecture spec table.

citations.claim: Trn2 UltraServer has 12,800 Gbps of EFAv3 networking
citations.note: AWS Trn2 instance page: UltraServer has '12.8 Tbps of EFAv3 networking' (4x the per-instance 3.2 Tbps)

citations.claim: Aggregate intra-UltraServer NeuronLink-v3 bandwidth is ~65.5 TB/s (64 chips x 1,024 GB/s)
citations.note: Derived: 64 chips x 1,024 GB/s/chip intra-instance NeuronLink-v3. Note: inter-instance links within UltraServer run at 256 GB/s/chip; the 1,024 figure applies to intra-instance chip pairs.
